list.name: device
list.label: Device
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "metrics", tag: "device_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "device_metrics", start: -30d)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_metrics" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => if "${device}" == "$__all" then true else contains(value: r.device_id, set: ${device:json}))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "value")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_metrics" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => if "${device}" == "$__all" then true else contains(value: r.device_id, set: ${device:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["device_id"])
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: count, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "msg_per_window")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "device_metrics" and r._field == "value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => if "${device}" == "$__all" then true else contains(value: r.device_id, set: ${device:json}))
  |> group(columns: ["device_id", "topic", "source"])
  |> last()
